Hi There! 👋🏻

I'M CUONG PHUNG THAI (EDDIE)

THE FOUNDER-BUILDER ESSENCE

A university student who has founded 2 startups, won academic research prizes competing against 2,500+ peers, closed a $5K marketing partnership deal solo at age 20, and cut his own content workflow from 5 hours to 1 hour using AI automation — all simultaneously. Combines research-grade data thinking with the hands-on instinct to actually ship.

I'm a Fintech Researcher at University of Economics Ho Chi Minh City (UEH) who loves turning emerging technology into real, practical solutions.

Currently, I'm scaling nOps Labs and Bep Ink , leveraging AI automation to redefine how brands communicate.

My key areas of interest include Fintech Research, AI Agents, and Crypto Tokenomics.

Whether it's closing VC deals, winning academic prizes, or building 24/7 AI agents, I am obsessed with efficiency and the speed to result.

Currently working on Fintech & AI

Know Who I AM

Hi everyone! I'm Cuong Phung Thai (Eddie) from Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
I'm a Fintech Researcher and Startup Founder, currently leading nOps Labs and Bep Ink.
I'm currently pursuing a degree in Financial Technology at University of Economics Ho Chi Minh City (UEH).

Beyond building startups and research, I enjoy:

  • Building AI Agents & Automation
  • AI Video Generation & Styling
  • Self-directed learning & inflation hedging

"Combines research-grade data thinking with the hands-on instinct to actually ship."

EDDIE

Career Experience

A high-stakes roadmap of founding ventures, AI orchestration, and quantitative research.

nOps Labs — AI Video Orchestration
High-Volume Production

Architected a fully autonomous AI Video Engine using n8n and FFmpeg. Scaled production capacity to 100-200 videos per day.

#n8n#FFmpeg#ComfyUI#Python
Key Impact: 100-200 Videos/Day

Bep Ink — FnB Growth Engine

Key Impact: HCMC Lead Discovery
Deep Dive
